scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/data && npm run build -w packages/admin && npm run build -w packages/forms && npm run build -w packages/grids
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w apps/admin && npm run build -w apps/form && npm run build -w apps/grid && npm run build -w apps/studio && npm run build -w apps/raptor
